How to Apply

Application Process

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Mauris consequat cursus tellus, vitae fermentum nisl lobortis et. Fusce non vehicula enim. Donec eget urna scelerisque, efficitur nisl eget, finibus lacus. Quisque quis leo nec ligula ultricies feugiat.

Steps to Apply

  1. Step 1: Visit our Talent Acquisition System.
  2. Step 2: Browse available job openings.
  3. Step 3: Click on the job listing to view details.
  4. Step 4: Review the job description and requirements.
  5. Step 5: Click on the "Apply Now" button.
  6. Step 6: Fill out the application form.
  7. Step 7: Submit your application.
  8. Step 8: Receive confirmation of application submission.


Contact Information:

For any inquiries regarding the application process or job listings, please contact our HR department at hr@seu.edu.bd.
